palette_hint: Deep charcoal #1a1a2e background with warm off-white #f5f0e8 text, accented by molten gold #c9a84c and soft teal #4e9fa3
type_style: Headings in Georgia serif at 700 weight for gravitas, body in system-ui at 400 with generous letter-spacing for an airy, editorial feel
description: Obsidian Cove Retreat is a secluded volcanic-island luxury resort website that uses layered gradients, glass-morphism cards, and a dark-gold visual language to evoke exclusivity and natural drama.
constraints: Max content width is 1100px centered; full-bleed section backgrounds extend edge-to-edge with radial gradients mixing #1a1a2e and #0d1b2a
A consistent elevation system: cards at box-shadow 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), modals/featured panels at 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.6), and hover states lifting to 0 20px 60px rgba(201,168,76,0.25)
Border-radius rhythm: buttons use 999px pill shape, cards use 12px, inner image frames use 4px; never mix these on the same element type
Decorative ::before pseudo-elements on section headings render a 48px wide 2px tall gold #c9a84c bar centered above the text, spaced 12px below it
Glass-morphism panels use background rgba(255,255,255,0.06), backdrop-filter blur(12px), and a 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3) border with 12px border-radius

page_specs.arrival: The homepage opens with a full-viewport hero section using a linear-gradient from #0d1b2a to #1a1a2e overlaid with a subtle radial warm glow at center, containing the resort name in 72px Georgia gold and a pill-shaped 'Discover the Cove' CTA button in #c9a84c. Below the hero, three glass-morphism feature cards highlight 'Private Cove Access', 'Volcanic Hot Springs', and 'Stargazing Terrace' each with a teal icon character, short two-line description, and the elevation hover shadow system. A final full-bleed band in #0d1b2a carries a centered pull-quote from Condé Nast Traveler in italic Georgia 28px off-white.
page_specs.suites: A grid of four suite categories — Obsidian Suite, Lava Stone Villa, Tide Pool Bungalow, and Cliff Edge Penthouse — displayed in 2×2 layout with 12px-radius cards on a dark charcoal background. Each card contains a decorative placeholder rectangle in a gradient from #1a1a2e to #2a2a4e at 280px tall representing the room image, a gold room name heading, a bullet list of three specific amenities (e.g. 'Heated onyx soaking tub', 'Butler service 24h', 'Private lava-rock terrace'), a nightly rate in #c9a84c bold, and a pill CTA 'Reserve This Suite'. Section heading uses the gold bar ::before pseudo-element and reads 'Your Private Sanctuary'.
page_specs.sanctuary-spa: A single-column editorial layout on a near-black #0d1b2a background describing the Sanctuary Spa's seven signature treatments: Volcanic Ash Exfoliation, Black Pearl Facial, Deep Tide Massage, Obsidian Stone Therapy, Sea Kelp Wrap, Sulphur Spring Soak, and Midnight Ritual Package. Each treatment is presented in a glass-morphism panel with treatment name in 24px Georgia gold, duration and price in teal #4e9fa3, and a two-sentence description in off-white body text. A radial gradient accent in rgba(201,168,76,0.08) blooms from the center of the page behind the panels.
page_specs.dining: Two restaurant concepts are presented side-by-side in equal-width panels with 12px radius and the full elevation shadow: 'Caldera' — a fine-dining room serving contemporary Pacific Rim cuisine — and 'The Tideline' — an open-air seafood grill on the beach. Each panel includes the restaurant name in 36px Georgia, a short three-sentence description, hours of operation, a sample dish list of five items with prices in #c9a84c, and a pill reservation link. A decorative horizontal rule between sections uses a linear-gradient from transparent through #c9a84c to transparent at 1px height and full width.
page_specs.reserve: A centered reservation form panel at max-width 640px using the glass-morphism style — rgba(255,255,255,0.06) background, blur(12px), gold border — containing labeled fields for guest name, email, arrival date, departure date, suite selection dropdown (all four suite types), number of guests, and special requests textarea. The submit button is full-width, pill-shaped, with a linear-gradient background from #c9a84c to #a8863a and bold white text 'Request Your Stay'. Below the form, three trust indicators in a row display 'Complimentary Airport Transfer', 'Flexible Cancellation 48h', and 'Best Rate Guarantee' each preceded by a teal #4e9fa3 checkmark character.
